selection.algorithm: sort ascending by SHA256(salt + NUL + unique_id), then take the first count rows

prompt_contract.system_prompt: Please reason step by step, and put your final answer within \boxed{}.

sampler.support_rule: freeze the source-faithful behavior support for score estimation and every candidate ratio

reward.definition: mean teacher-forced log probability of the first continuation tokens after executing one sampled latent mixture
reward.advantage_normalization: within each consecutive group, subtract the group mean and divide by the Bessel-corrected sample standard deviation plus 1e-4, matching torch.std default behavior in the pinned trainer

candidate_updates.evaluation: independent old-policy actions with exact fixed-support Concrete importance ratios

decision_rule: Matched training is authorized only if all five controls pass, both gradient-semantic effects pass, and either (a) the exact-minus-surrogate gain clears both its mean and bootstrap lower-bound gates or (b) the exact candidate positive-rate advantage clears its gate. Sign disagreement is reported as an operational effect but cannot alone authorize training. No threshold or aggregation rule may change after the first effect-bearing run.
